description_long: This is a cylindrical wooden barrel with vertical planks, reinforced at the top with a metallic band. The wood is painted or stained a pale, weathered white, showing signs of age and exposure, with some visible stains and minor surface imperfections. A prominent yellow triangular warning sign with a black exclamation mark is affixed to one side, suggesting caution or hazardous contents. The top surface is flat and appears to be made of the same wood as the sides, bordered by the metal band. The bottom edge is darker, possibly from contact with the ground or additional reinforcement. There are no visible handles or openings, and the overall construction suggests it is designed for storage or containment in an urban or industrial setting.
description: A weathered, white wooden barrel with a metal band at the top and a yellow warning sign on one side. The surface shows age and urban use, with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow warning sign and the full detail of the wood grain and metal band.
description_view_1: Side view with the warning sign just out of sight, highlighting the vertical wood planks and metal band.
description_view_2: Rear view with no markings, showing the symmetry of the wood planks and the continuous metal band.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with some wood imperfections and the metal band, no visible markings.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: yellow warning sign with exclamation mark
